channel.title: Bosco Ho
channel.description: Writing by Bosco Ho — iOS & macOS developer in Vancouver.

item.title: Text Variant Preference View Modifier in SwiftUI
item.description: Use the .textVariant(.sizeDependent) view modifier to automatically format and fit text inside Text view's size. New in iOS 18, this simplifies code that previously required ViewThatFits or conditional views to avoid text truncation.

item.title: Unicode + Swift: Transforming Mandarin Pinyin Diacritics into IPA (Numeric) Form
item.description: A note on converting Mandarin Pinyin diacritic tone marks into numeric IPA form using Swift's Unicode decomposition APIs — motivated by a speech synthesis use-case on Apple platforms.

item.title: Navigation Split View — 3 Columns for Non-List Views
item.description: A workaround for NavigationSplitView's three-column API not working as expected on iPhone compact size when the content column is a non-List view such as LazyVGrid.
